results.content: are reading this latest preprint version. Scientific discovery is fundamentally an optimization problem, defined by a vast `state space'' of theories and experiments, and an evaluation criterion based on quality, novelty, and validity. Here, we propose formalizing research as meta-optimization, where the optimization objective itself is also being optimized. Our key contribution is` consensus objective aggregation,'' where LLM-generated objective functions are combined via correlation-weighted [...] ###### Preprints. ###### In Review Journals. ###### COVID-19 Preprints. ###### AJE Video Bytes. ###### Research Tools. ###### Research Promotion. ###### AJE Professional Editing. ###### AJE Rubriq. ###### Preprint Platform. ###### In Review. # Scientific discovery as meta-optimization: a combinatorial optimization case study. results.title: Bayesian Optimization for Scientific Discovery
results.content: Bayesian optimization is a sequential decision-making approach that uses Gaussian process surrogates to efficiently navigate expensive evaluation spaces. Bayesian optimization for scientific discovery is a sequential decision-making methodology for maximizing (or minimizing) expensive-to-evaluate functions where each experimental or computational evaluation is resource-intensive. At each iteration, new experiments or evaluations are selected by optimizing an acquisition function, which [...] described via a continuous surrogate (e.g., GP), the methodology applies across chemistry, biology, physics, hyperparameter optimization for machine learning, or chemical process control. Bayesian optimization, underpinned by GP regression and one-step Bayes-optimal acquisition functions, provides a highly adaptive, information-theoretically motivated framework for sequential experiment planning in scientific discovery. It is able to accelerate the identification of optimal (or near-optimal) [...] (or near-optimal) designs under strict experimental budgets by updating beliefs after each observation and guiding subsequent sampling to maximize expected knowledge gain or improvement. Get notified by email when new papers are published related to Bayesian Optimization for Scientific Discovery. 5. Find recent papers about Bayesian optimization in materials discovery.

results.title: AI Revolutionizes Scientific Discovery: Human-in-the-Loop Optimization for Fusion Energy and Beyond
results.content:
approach called Human-in-the-Loop Meta Bayesian Optimization (HL-MBO) has emerged, blending human expertise with advanced machine learning to accelerate discovery in these critical, data-scarce domains. This innovative framework, detailed in a recent paper by researchers from Hewlett Packard Enterprise and the University of Rochester, signifies a major leap in how we approach high-stakes scientific optimization. The full paper can be accessed here: Human-in-the-Loop Meta Bayesian Optimization [...] ## How HL-MBO Works: A Synergistic Approach

      HL-MBO builds upon Meta-Bayesian Optimization (Meta-BO), which learns from a collection of previous, related optimization tasks to improve its ability to optimize new, unseen problems with very few initial data points (known as "few-shot" learning). Instead of starting fresh for every new challenge, Meta-BO leverages accumulated knowledge, making the optimization process significantly more efficient. [...] To overcome these limitations, HL-MBO integrates two powerful concepts: "Human-in-the-Loop" and "Meta-Bayesian Optimization," enhanced with explainability. This framework was specifically developed through collaboration between AI researchers and ICF physicists, ensuring it directly addresses real-world experimental challenges. At its core, HL-MBO aims to improve both the efficiency and trustworthiness of black-box optimization in environments where data is scarce but the impact of

Meta-heuristic optimization algorithms are used in many application areas to solve optimization problems. In recent years, meta-heuristic optimization algorithms have gained importance over deterministic search algorithms in solving optimization problems. Many alternative meta-heuristic algorithms inspired by nature have been developed to solve complex optimization problems. A novel statistical approach for comparing meta-heuristic stochastic optimization algorithms according to the distribution of solutions in the search space. Metaheuristic optimization algorithms present an effective method for solving several optimization problems from various types of applications and fields. However, STVBO can be enhanced in terms of convergence rate and avoiding local optima for solving certain [...] New and efficient meta-heuristic algorithms are always in demand to solve real world optimization problems due to its exploiting capability in the search domain to generate the global optimal solution. The Sailfish Optimizer: A novel nature-inspired metaheuristic algorithm for solving constrained engineering optimization problems.

results.title: Meta-Optimization of Universes: Framing Reality Formation as an Optimization Problem
results.content: enhancing our capacity for scientific discovery and philosophical reflection. By framing universe formation through optimization, we foster a multidimensional understanding that bridges empirical realities with contemplative inquiry. [...] also invites deeper explorations into the theoretical landscapes of multiverses. Ultimately, coherence acts as a guiding principle in the meta-optimization of universes. A universe characterized by high coherence is positioned to provide a robust framework for both scientific inquiry and metaphysical exploration, enriching our understanding of reality itself. This philosophical backdrop suggests that when universes are optimized, the considerations of beauty may align with deeper intrinsic [...] deeper intrinsic values, guiding the formation of reality in a way that promotes harmony and coherence. Ultimately, the role of beauty in the optimization of universes should be recognized as a legitimate objective, taking into account its capacity to guide scientific inquiry and influence artistic endeavors.
